creator: sjr@comcast.net
text:
On 30 Nov, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/tkrat2,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/106039 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106039
> 

The proposed patch is fine.

Thanks,
-SR

-- 
Stephen J. Roznowski    (sjr@comcast.net)
